title: RNA viruses — abbreviated materials defect fixture

M1.content:
## RNA virus overview

RNA viruses carry ribonucleic acid genomes. Positive-sense genomes function directly as mRNA, while negative-sense genomes require transcription before translation. Hepatitis C virus is a positive-sense flavivirus with a single open reading frame translated into a polyprotein that is cleaved into structural and non-structural proteins.
